name: Chlamydia Screening Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for chlamydia screening laboratory tests. Used in the chlamydia screening in women (CHL) measure for sexually active women ages 16-24.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Infectious agent antigen detection, Chlamydia trachomatis, direct fluorescent antibody (DFA)
Infectious agent antigen detection, Chlamydia trachomatis, enzyme immunoassay (EIA)
Infectious agent detection, Chlamydia trachomatis, direct probe technique
Infectious agent detection, Chlamydia trachomatis, amplified probe technique (NAAT)
Infectious agent antigen detection, Chlamydia trachomatis, immunoassay with direct optical observation
Chlamydia trachomatis [Presence] in Specimen by Organism specific culture
Chlamydia trachomatis DNA [Presence] in Cervix by NAA with probe detection
Chlamydia trachomatis DNA [Presence] in Urethra by NAA with probe detection
Chlamydia trachomatis DNA [Presence] in Specimen by NAA with probe detection
Chlamydia trachomatis rRNA [Presence] in Specimen by NAA with probe detection
Chlamydia trachomatis rRNA [Presence] in Urine by NAA with probe detection
